name: Basque Tongue and Sauce.
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash one large beef tongue or several lamb tongues well.
2. Place the tongue in a kettle and cover with cold water.
3. Add 2 whole garlic cloves and salt and pepper to taste.
4. Bring the water to a boil and turn down the heat.
5. Cover the kettle with a lid and keep the water boiling until the tongue is tender (this can take three or more hours).
6. When the tongue is tender, run cold water over it and skin it.
7. Trim the membranes under the tongue.
8. Slice the tongue into about 1/4 inch slices.
9. Sauté the garlic, onion, and green pepper until golden brown.
10. Add tomato sauce, pimento, and sugar to the skillet. Simmer slowly for 15 minutes.
11. Add the tongue and continue simmering until it is hot.
12. This dish can be served hot or cold. The sauce can also be used for tripe, pigs feet, or any leftover meat.
